spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates smooth CSS zoom transition in layout flow on card hover/focus.

interactive.rationale: Allows direct interaction with a grid of cards via hover and focus states.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the core milestone description showing layout reflow.

edge_cases.rationale: The unrelated generic probe panel was removed on 2026-06-04; the remaining zoom hover/focus behavior still needs DevTools MCP verification.

references.rationale: Correctly links to the ChromeStatus entry and MDN documentation.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the global design system and WCAG rules.

openQuestions.title: Re-review after generic probe removal
openQuestions.detail: The unrelated generated live-probe controls were removed on 2026-06-04. Use chrome-devtools-mcp to re-test the remaining concept UI; if the page is now static or lacks a feature-specific observable behavior, add a real control, readout, server-backed route, or exact feature probe rather than restoring the generic panel.

summary: Demonstrates basic zoom hover reflow but includes a copied capability probe panel checking for unrelated browser features. 2026-06-04 maintenance removed the unrelated generic live-probe panel; this critique needs chrome-devtools-mcp re-review before treating the interactivity score as current.
